prompt: set up linting and commit hooks based on our coding conventions
expected_output: Reads all 9 coding-rules docs, detects framework from package.json devDependencies, presents per-group approval (ESLint rules, TSConfig strict, commitlint config, husky hooks), outputs install command without auto-running pnpm add
assertions: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for init-coding-rules
Mentions framework detection from package.json devDependencies
Mentions safe install pattern (no auto-run pnpm add)
